hooks.command: test -d node_modules || echo 'WARNING: Run pnpm install'
which uv || echo 'WARNING: uv not found — required for Python crawler scripts'
test -d crawler/.venv || echo 'WARNING: Run cd crawler && uv sync'
[ "$(git branch --show-current)" != "main" ] && [ "$(git branch --show-current)" != "master" ] || { echo '{"block": true, "message": "禁止直接修改主分支，请先 git checkout -b feat/xxx"}' >&2; exit 2; }
